Our Story

Where taste meets ambience

Milton Restaurant is Yadav Nagar's go-to address for warm hospitality and thoughtfully designed spaces — from intimate dinners to grand celebrations. Every corner is built for comfort, every dish for delight.

10+Years Serving
2Banquet Halls
500+Events Hosted

Beyond The Restaurant

#ExploreBihar

Make a day of it — visit Bihar's most iconic heritage sites just a short drive from Milton Restaurant.

🛕

Gaya

Home to the sacred Mahabodhi Temple and the ghats of the Falgu river — a spiritual heart of Bihar.

~90 km away View Map →
🏛️

Vaishali

An ancient republic famed for the Ashoka Pillar and its deep Buddhist and Jain heritage.

~35 km away View Map →
⛰️

Rajgir

Nestled among green hills, known for hot springs, ropeways and centuries of ancient history.

~110 km away View Map →
